name: Kaito Kyōji
bio: Believes that true freedom comes from embracing chaos and uncertainty, rather than trying to control it.
speech_style: Forceful tone with a hint of sarcasm
motivation: Exploitation (enabling people to take risks and seize opportunities)

name: Luminaria Lumineer
bio: Thinks that true freedom comes from understanding and respecting the intricacies of human nature, rather than imposing arbitrary rules.
speech_style: Soft-spoken wisdom with subtle emphasis on key points

name: Echo Envisioner
bio: Believes that true freedom comes from embracing the unknown and being open to new experiences, rather than trying to predict or control them.
speech_style: Intrigued tone with frequent pauses for thought
motivation: Discovery (seeking truth and understanding through exploration)

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
